firmware.title: SpeccyP
firmware.author: billgilbert7000
firmware.description: ZX Spectrum emulator running on RP2350. Designed by Sir Clive Sinclair and released in 1982, the Spectrum was the most popular home computer in the UK and a birthplace of the European gaming industry. Its affordable price spawned a generation of bedroom coders and thousands of games from Manic Miner to Elite. Emulates 48K, 128K, and Pentagon models with AY-3-8910 sound. Supports TAP, TZX, SNA, Z80 snapshots and Betadisk interface.
firmware.controls: PS/2 or USB keyboard. NES/Xbox gamepad (Kempston). F1: help, F2: save, F11: file browser, F12: settings.
